message:
fix(config): improve proptest assertion for extension risk alpha env precedence

The previous proptest compared resolved config against a baseline
Config::default() to detect env overrides, but this was fragile:
the baseline itself could be influenced by env state, making the
assertion tautological in some environments.

Rewrite to directly parse PI_EXTENSION_RISK_ALPHA from the environment
and assert that:
- When the env var is set and valid, it overrides the config value and
  source is "env"
- When the env var is absent/invalid, config alpha (clamped) is used

This makes the test independent of Config::default() env sensitivity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
